Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 30, 2026

ReStock Reminder ("we", "our", "the app") is a Shopify application that helps merchants send reorder reminder emails to their customers. This policy explains how we handle data.

1. Data We Collect

When a merchant installs ReStock Reminder, we access the following data through Shopify's API:

  • Store information: Store name, email address, and domain
  • Product data: Product titles and IDs (read-only)
  • Order data: Order details including customer email, product purchased, and purchase date (read-only)
  • Customer data: Customer email addresses for sending reminder emails

2. How We Use Data

We use the collected data solely to:

  • Track when customers purchase products
  • Calculate when reorder reminders should be sent
  • Send reminder emails to customers on behalf of the merchant
  • Display analytics (reminders sent, open rates) to the merchant

3. Data Storage

Data is stored securely on encrypted servers hosted by Render.com in the United States. We store:

  • Store access tokens (encrypted)
  • Order records (customer email, product, purchase date)
  • Reminder logs (email sent, open/click status)

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share merchant or customer data with any third parties. Data is used exclusively for the app's reminder functionality.

The only third-party service involved is our email delivery provider, which processes reminder emails on behalf of the merchant.

5. Data Retention

We retain data for as long as the app is installed. When a merchant uninstalls the app:

  • The access token is immediately invalidated
  • Order records and reminder logs are deleted within 30 days

6. Merchant Responsibilities

Merchants are responsible for:

  • Ensuring they have consent to email their customers
  • Complying with applicable email marketing laws (CAN-SPAM, GDPR, etc.)
  • Including unsubscribe options as required by law

7. Customer Rights

Customers who receive reminder emails can:

  • Contact the merchant directly to opt out of reminders
  • Contact us to request data deletion

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated through the app or via email to installed merchants.

9. Contact

For privacy questions or data requests, contact us at:

kame6493@gmail.com

© 2026 ReStock Reminder. All rights reserved.
